ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., Carbon Dioxide(CO2)) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, draft) */,
  "collection_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data collection */,
  "collection_end_date" TEXT /* End date of data collection */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the dataset */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., West Branch, Iowa, United States) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey or inspection at the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural, forest) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "maintenance_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for site maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the category */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Surface PFP, Aircraft PFP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent type to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the data type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data type was last modified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data type */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Discrete, Continuous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "parent_frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent frequency to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the frequency was last modified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the frequency */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type (e.g., csv, txt, pdf) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was collected */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_inspections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check (e.g., data integrity, consistency) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the quality check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality check */,
  "checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
